source.section: 2.2 - Air-to-Ground Modes > 2.2.3 - EXP (Expanded) Modes > 2.2.3.4 - Designation with EXP Mode

steps.action: Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the radar screen (RIGHT) to slave the TDC (Throttle Designation Controller) to the current radar screen (diamond should be visible).
Make sure one of the EXP mode is selected (see previous sections). EXP3 mode is recommended for best precision, but it can work with any other EXP mode.
Press and hold TDC DEPRESS control (« ENTER »).
While TDC DEPRESS is held, slew the TDC cursor on the desired spot you want to designate using the TDC controls.
Release the TDC DEPRESS control to designate target.
The air-to-ground radar will automatically adjust its range to give you a better view of the point you just designated.
On the Radar page, a cross will mark the designated point. On the HUD, a diamond will mark the designated point. This point can be used/slaved to by other sensors (like the targeting pod) if desired.
Pressing the « Undesignate » button on the stick will delete the designation point.
